name: research
description: v1.1.9 - Fixes research protocol contradictions and removes Japanese text from active skill surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Research and R&D protocols with quant finance specialization
interface.longDescription: v1.1.9 - Workstream-aware serious research and R&D workflows with clarified TRL, integration-pattern, lifecycle, and promotion semantics; active skill surfaces use English-only protocol vocabulary. The plugin exposes a generic research skill for mixed research projects with local workstream gates, plus a quant-research adapter for financial machine learning, backtests, time-series validation, leakage checks, Sharpe/DSR review, transaction costs, and portfolio-oriented evidence.
